repos.title: Repositories
repos.subtitle: Hosted in <org/> — private by default, public repos allow anonymous pull.
repos.countTitle: Repositories matching the filter / total in this org
repos.noMatch: No repositories match the current filter.

empty.title: No repositories yet
empty.body: Push an OCI image to create a repository. Private by default — only org members can pull until you change the visibility.

tags.title: Tags
tags.empty: No tags yet. Push an image to this repository to create the first tag.

deleteTag.title: Delete tag
deleteTag.description: Remove the tag pointer <tag/>? The manifest and layers remain in the content-addressable store and are cleaned up by the garbage collector on its next eviction cycle.

grants.title: Shared with
grants.hint: Cross-org pull/push grants for this repository
grants.empty: Not shared with any other org.

push.title: Push guide
push.subtitle: Three commands to push a private image to <host/> under org <org/>.
push.subtitleNoOrg: Three commands to push a private image to <host/>.

step1.title: Authenticate
step1.body: Log in with your Specula email and an API key. Keys are org-scoped — generate one here, or manage existing keys on the <lnk>Tokens</lnk> page.
step1.selectOrgFirst: Select an active org first (identity rail above).
step1.noKeyYet: Don't have an API key yet?
step1.keyWarning: Save this key — it will not be shown again. Revoke it from the <lnk>Tokens</lnk> page if compromised. You can generate additional keys there too.

step2.title: Tag your image
step2.body: Retag your local image with the Specula registry prefix. Replace <image/>, <repo/>, and <tag/> with your values.
step2.note: A repository is created on first push and defaults to private. Change visibility on the Repositories page.

step3.title: Push
step3.body: The image appears in <lnk>Repositories</lnk> after a successful push with its tag, digest, and manifest size.

pull.title: Pull reference
pull.body: Public repos allow anonymous pull. Private repos require <c>docker login</c> first. Per-tag pull commands are available on each repository's detail page.

toast.keyCreatedDesc: Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
